lines.lyric_translation: Hey I’ve had my eyes on you

lines.lyric: Urin cheoeumijiman modeun jaemireul neukkil su isseo
lines.lyric_hangul: 우린 처음이지만 모든 재미를 느낄 수 있어
lines.lyric_translation: We just met but it’s been fun
I wanna know more
Hey don’t just laugh

lines.lyric: Gabon jeogi eomneun gose neoreul deryeoga julge
lines.lyric_hangul: 가본 적이 없는 곳에 너를 데려가 줄게
lines.lyric_translation: I can take you to a place you’ve never been before

lines.lyric: Come with me, put it on put it on me
lines.lyric_hangul: Come with me, put it on put it on me
lines.lyric_translation: Come with me, put it on put it on me

lines.lyric: You got this, put it on put it on me
lines.lyric_hangul: You got this, put it on put it on me
lines.lyric_translation: You got this, put it on put it on me
I know you’ll take my hand

lines.lyric: Cause I know that you’ve been dreaming
lines.lyric_hangul: Cause I know that you've been dreaming
lines.lyric_translation: ‘Cause I know that you’ve been dreaming
Like a deja vu of heaven
Meet up, let’s start your interview

lines.lyric: Nega weonhan modeun geol da jul suga isseo
lines.lyric_hangul: 네가 원한 모든 걸 다 줄 수가 있어
lines.lyric_translation: I can give you everything you want
Down to your darkest sides
Come come into my world
Won’t let you down
Won’t let you down
Come to me

lines.lyric: In my In my In my new world
lines.lyric_hangul: In my In my In my new world
lines.lyric_translation: In my in my in my new world

lines.lyric: Knock knock knockin’ on heaven’s door
lines.lyric_hangul: Knock knock knockin' on heaven's door
lines.lyric_translation: Knock knock knockin’ on heaven’s door
Run your fingertips over the whipped cream cloud

lines.lyric: Nae All star mite ditgo nara Sunset
lines.lyric_hangul: 내 All star 밑에 딛고 날아 Sunset
lines.lyric_translation: Step out my All Stars and fly, sunset

lines.lyric: Neom ppareum I’ma take it slow
lines.lyric_hangul: 넘 빠름 I'ma take it slow
lines.lyric_translation: Too fast? I’ma take it slow

lines.lyric: Seulpeumi eomneun goseseo idaero chumeul chweo
lines.lyric_hangul: 슬픔이 없는 곳에서 이대로 춤을 춰
lines.lyric_translation: Dance like this where there’s no sadness
Clap your hands to the beat

lines.lyric: Neon yeongweoneul naege jweo gippeume maseul deo
lines.lyric_hangul: 넌 영원을 내게 줘 기쁨의 맛을 더
lines.lyric_translation: Give me your forever, more taste of this bliss

lines.lyric: Yeongweone yeongweoneul deo deo deo deo
lines.lyric_hangul: 영원에 영원을 더 더 더 더
lines.lyric_translation: Forever and ever more more more more

lines.lyric_translation: I can give you everything you want
Down to your darkest sides

lines.lyric: In my In my In my new world
lines.lyric_hangul: In my In my In my new world
lines.lyric_translation: In my in my in my new world

lines.lyric: We got the heart We got the soul
lines.lyric_hangul: We got the heart We got the soul
lines.lyric_translation: We got the heart we got the soul
Open our hearts just like this
To you, and you to me

lines.lyric: Saeroun miraereul yeoreojweo na soneul nochi aneulge
lines.lyric_hangul: 새로운 미래를 열어줘 나 손을 놓지 않을게
lines.lyric_translation: Open up a new future, I won’t let go of your hand

lines.lyric: Trust in me baby I can see

Like a deja vu of heaven
